itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very bad school, yaha pe complaint karne par koi action nhi hota hai galti se bhi aap apne bacche ko is 3rd class school mein mat admission karana

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
3 rd class school , yha par mera baccha 6th class mein study karta hai, bus mein ek bacche ne bad word bole fir school mein interval mein uske upar food dalke, mother father ke upar bad word bole,hum iski complaint karne school gay, waha par bus driver ne principal ko bola ki yeh 8th class ka baccha 6th class ke bacche ko pareshan karta hai, humne us bacche ke parents ko bulane ke liye principal ko bola,tou principal ne bola humne bacche ko punishment de diya hai , uske parents ko bhi call nhi kara
Very bad school,aap sabhi parents se request hai ki is school mein apne bacche ko mat admission karana

Thanks

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Washroom are dirty...the vice principal is forcing the students of class 12th to buy school blazzers and uniform and other school accessories which are only 1-2 days of use(waste of money) students are playing on bus yard no proper in infrastructure for sports students are literally playing gravel and stone(gitti) the owner of this school has audi and mercedes but can't invest in sports infrastructure shame on this school

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
School ki hakikat
Isse bakwas school aur koisa nahi ho sakta isme parents ne jo review share kiye hai wo school ki hakikat hai fees october me hi fulfill karna padta baki school me january tak ka time rahta hai aur October month means 1  2 tarik me karna padega

aur study to bachche ko jo b aata hai usse b kharab halat hai

bus service itni bakwas hai ki parent 1 ghante stop par hi intzar karte hai pata hi nahi hota aaj konsi bus me shift kiya hai

school atmosphere bahut bekar hai mene b apne bachche ka admission krake bahut badi galti ki thi yha

admission ke time bataya jata hai sab kuchh online hai but reality me ek bhi app nahi hai

Parents apke aur bachhe ki life me paresani nahi hai to iss school me admission le lo sab samajh aa jayega

Yha management se kuchh bolo to wo bolte hai yha esa hi chalata hai aap hi socho jaha koi sunwai nahi hai wo bachche ki kya halat hogi

yha ptm tab hoti hai jab problem kam ho aur PTM me parents aur child ko bahar rakhte hai fir jab 1 ghante bad apka number aata hai tab jana hota hai

yha har sal maximum bachche TC lete hai but naye parents inki baaton me aakar admission lete hai aur ek sal bad unki condition bhi same ho jati hai

Agar itna padkar bhi aap admission lete hai to best of luck for you and your child

ye kewal review nahi hai school ki hakikat hai school ke parents se confirm karke dekho kya hakikat hai aage apki marji but its reality

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Miserable and deplorable school no manners how to treat people.if u call reception they r very very rude shut down this school never send yr child here

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very worst experience no one is responsible for anything buses getting late most of time no good management not proper study no improvement in child in 2 years

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
The international school of Bombay
Indore World school ki fees recovery k ladies ne ek bacche ko school aane k liye mana kr diya kaha h ki jab tak second statment jama nhi karoge tab tak bacche ko school mat bhejo Ghar m baitha lo itna ghatiya rawayya h in recovery vali orato ka ki next year Tak inke school m tala lag jayga.

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very worst experience....I had put my daughter in the first class. She is also in the third class and has a lot of experience with buses, sometimes they are late, sometimes they come early.The studies are not good at all, my daughter is not able to understand maths of this school at all.I have wasted money by putting him in school.They say package up to class 12th and these people rob Rs 3 lakh. It's been so long since school opened. July August and today my doll got her ID card on 11th September. The management is not good at all.

itemReviewed.name: The International School of Bombay - Indore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very bad school partiality with students very very bad
